problem text: Given that WHITE=$000$, RED=$101$, BLUE=$110$, and PURPLE=$100$, determine the three-digit sequence for YELLOW.
problem solution: The rule is that for the initial three sounds, $0$ signifies the vowel is enunciated and $1$ signifies the consonant is enunciated. Thus, YELLOW corresponds to $001$.
valid answer: Valid Answers: [$20/mo \text{ billed annually to Invest in your future today}, $30/mo \text{ billed monthly to try it out and see if its worth it}]
problem hint: Consider the distinction between consonants and vowels.
